backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining BlogPost and UserProfile types, with CRUD operations for blog posts and user profiles, access control via AccessControl/MixinAuthorization mixins, and blob storage integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that admin access guards were removed from CreateBlogPostPage and EditBlogPostPage so any authenticated user can access those routes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing component purposes, styling decisions, and recent changes across the AyurGlow Secrets app.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, plus Tailwind base/components/utilities directives.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AyurGlow Secrets app, setting metadata, theme color, and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router and React Query; Create/Edit blog post routes are mounted without AdminRoute guards, while admin management routes retain the AdminRoute wrapper.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a centered access-denied message with a shield icon and a home navigation button for users lacking admin privileges.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Passthrough wrapper component that renders its children directly, effectively removing any admin access guard logic.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Sidebar component for blog pages featuring a remedy search bar with results overlay, popular posts list with thumbnails, and a category count breakdown.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Renders a comment form and list for a given blog post, using React Query hooks to fetch and submit comments with loading states.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Displays a single featured blog post as a large image card with overlaid title, excerpt, metadata, and a link to the full post.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, quick links, category links, legal links, social media icons, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with the shared Navigation and Footer components in a full-height flex column layout.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive top navigation bar with desktop links, a categories dropdown, an admin link, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Displays a blog post summary card with thumbnail image, category badge, title, excerpt, and author/date/read-time metadata.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A controlled search input with a clear button and keyboard event handlers (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown) forwarded via ref.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Dropdown list of search results with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape), category badges, and click-to-navigate behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile CRUD, admin access checks, and blog post queries and mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Hook that filters a static list of Ayurvedic remedy pages by title, category, or keywords based on a search query string.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including an AyurGlow-specific color palette.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page for AyurGlow Secrets displaying the platform's mission, philosophy, and offerings in styled card sections.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that lists all blog posts with options to create, edit, delete, and toggle publish/unpublish state, using mutation hooks and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page that fetches and displays published posts in a grid with a sidebar, handling loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Detail page for a single blog post fetched by slug, rendering the article content with resolved inline and featured images, metadata, and a comment section.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating a new blog post with a rich-text Quill editor, featured image upload, category/tag fields, and optional immediate publishing.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Form page for editing an existing blog post, pre-populating all fields including restored inline images and featured image from the fetched post data.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: A page displaying four natural/Ayurvedic remedies for dandruff and scalp care, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency. Includes a hero section and links back to the Hair Care page.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: A page presenting four Ayurvedic remedies to prevent or reverse premature greying, including curry leaf oil, amla-henna pack, black tea rinse, and bhringraj-brahmi oil. Structured with a hero section and remedy cards.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: A page listing four natural treatments for hair fall (onion juice, fenugreek mask, amla-shikakai pack, curry leaves oil), each detailing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: A page showcasing four Ayurvedic hair growth remedies including castor-coconut oil blend, aloe-bhringraj mask, egg-yogurt protein treatment, and hibiscus-curry leaves pack, with full ingredient and application details.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: A page featuring five Ayurvedic hair oil and mask treatments (hot oil, brahmi-amla oil, banana-avocado mask, hibiscus-fenugreek mask, neem-tulsi scalp oil), each with ingredients, steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Static landing page for the Hair Care category, displaying a hero section and a grid of subcategory cards that link to specific hair care topic pages.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: Displays a static page of four Ayurvedic remedies for diabetes and blood pressure management, each with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and frequency. Includes a medical disclaimer banner.

A styled alternative page for diabetes and BP remedies using Card components and a hero section with a back-navigation link. Presents four remedies with ingredients, preparation, benefits, and usage alongside an important medical notice alert.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: Renders a styled page for digestion and gut health remedies using Card components, featuring four Ayurvedic remedies with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage instructions.
Displays a simpler static page of four Ayurvedic digestive health remedies with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency, using Lucide icons for visual distinction.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: Displays a page of four Ayurvedic immunity-boosting remedies (e.g., Turmeric Milk, Amla Juice) each with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage, rendered as styled cards with a hero section and back-navigation link.
Presents four Ayurvedic immunity-boosting remedies with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency, using inline black color styles and Lucide icons.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: Renders a stress-relief and sleep page listing four Ayurvedic remedies (e.g., Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Chamomile-Lavender Blend) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a simple card layout.

A more styled alternative stress and sleep solutions page presenting the same four remedy types with a purple-themed hero section, back-navigation link, and Card-based layout matching the site's design system.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: Displays four Ayurvedic weight-management remedies (e.g., Lemon-Honey Water, Ginger-Green Tea) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a simple card grid layout.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Displays the Health Remedies landing page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic subcategory cards (immunity, digestion, weight management, diabetes/BP, stress/sleep) that link to their respective sub-pages.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the AyurGlow Secrets home page with a hero banner, a 'What We Offer' feature grid, and sections for featured and recent blog posts fetched via the useGetPublishedPosts hook.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Static Privacy Policy page that outlines data collection, usage, and user rights for AyurGlow Secrets, presented in styled cards with a hero header and back-to-home link.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: Presents a skin-care page for acne and pimples featuring four herbal remedies (e.g., Neem-Turmeric Face Pack, Tea Tree Oil Spot Treatment) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency, styled with a blue-themed hero section and Card components.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: Displays a page of four Ayurvedic acne treatment remedies (e.g., Neem-Turmeric Paste, Tea Tree-Aloe Spot Treatment), each showing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: Renders a page of four natural anti-aging remedies (e.g., Almond-Saffron Youth Serum, Avocado-Honey Mask), each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: Presents five DIY face pack recipes categorized by skin type (e.g., Multani Mitti for oily skin, Oatmeal-Honey for sensitive skin), with ingredients, steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: Shows four Ayurvedic natural glow remedies (e.g., Turmeric-Yogurt Mask, Saffron-Milk Treatment), each listing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and recommended frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: Displays a page with four natural remedies for pigmentation and dark spots (e.g., Lemon-Honey Mask, Potato-Cucumber Juice), including a hero section, ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency using Card components.
React page displaying four natural Ayurvedic remedies for skin pigmentation reduction, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Displays the Skin Care landing page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic skin-care subcategory cards (natural glow, acne, pigmentation, anti-aging, DIY face packs) linking to their sub-pages.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Static Terms of Service page for AyurGlow Secrets, featuring a medical disclaimer alert and multiple policy sections (agreement, website use, etc.) rendered in styled cards.
frontend/src/utils/imageUtils.ts: Utility functions for handling ExternalBlob image URLs, including converting blobs to direct URLs, injecting data-blob-index attributes into HTML img tags, and replacing img src values using blob index mappings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color palette (AyurGlow-themed with earth greens, gold, cream, etc. using OKLCH variables), custom fonts, border radii, and box shadows.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the AyurGlow Secrets blog app, tracking existing features and pending requests to remove admin-only restrictions on blog post creation and editing.
